channel.title: Lijustore - Product Feed
channel.description: Google Merchant product feed for Lijustore Kenya — home appliances, electronics, furniture, and more.

item.g:title: Multifunctional Vehicle Inverter 12/24V
item.g:description: Multifunctional 12/24V vehicle inverter for reliable power on the go.
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Automotive Parts & Accessories > Automotive Accessories
